name: Clinuvel Pharmaceuticals Limited
analysis: It is coming off a base, 30% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.6× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$9.6600. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$9.7800, stop A$8.2665, target A$11.9000 (1.40:1) — then trail it.
